task: Parse an AWS S3 bucket name from an S3 URI (e.g., s3://my-bucket/path/to/object) and extract just the bucket name
Create a Python function that takes an AWS region code and returns the corresponding region name (e.g., 'us-east-1' -> 'N. Virginia')
Generate a valid AWS IAM policy JSON document that grants read-only access to all objects in a specific S3 bucket
